title: arabis platysperma var. howellii
intro: Arabis platysperma var. howellii, also known as Howell's rockcress, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Arabis platysperma var. howellii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although its use should be carefully monitored due to its rarity and potential side effects.
